request.prompt: Create one classroom-safe educational image about Autotrophs vs Heterotrophs. Subject: Science (086). Grade level: Class X / 10. Topic focus: Nutrition: Autotrophs vs Heterotrophs. Must show visually: Autotrophic: Make own food (Plants, Algae); Heterotrophic: Depend on others (Animals, Fungi); Key Difference: Source of Carbon. Visual goal: Clean comparison table or split card design. Left side shows a green plant with sun icon (Autotroph). Right side shows diverse animals eating (Heterotroph). Use distinct color coding: Green for Autotrophs, Orange/Red for Heterotrophs.. Teaching context: Define the two fundamental modes of nutrition.. Student takeaway: Students can classify organisms based on how they obtain food.. Show the scientific or educational concept itself, not a presentation slide about the concept. Do not draw a slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, classroom poster,...
request.negativePrompt: text, labels, captions, numbers, watermark, decorative clutter, formula text, axis labels, diagram callouts, presentation slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, poster layout, infographic layout, ui card, worksheet, powerpoint slide, presentation template
request.subject: Science (086)
